name: @tootallnate/ps-adpcm
description: Pure-JS decoder for Sony PS-ADPCM (also known as SPU-ADPCM, VAG, or simply 'ADPCM' in Sony SDK docs), the 4-bit lossy audio codec used on PS1/PS2/PS3/PSP/Vita. Packs 28 samples per 16-byte frame. Produces s16 PCM ready to wrap in a WAV file or feed to the Web Audio API.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
